title: Why is "Latch inferred for signal" produced when linting the code below?

features.name: automatic logic variable in begin-end block within casez branch in always_comb
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with a casez statement where one branch has a begin-end block containing an automatic logic variable declaration

features.name: variable width part select via concatenation in shift expression
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount uses concatenation of multiple signal bits forming a variable width
features.snippet:
logic [16:0] tmp;
tmp = immediate >> {14'h0, inputs_2, inputs_1[0], inputs_0[0]};
